channel.title: AI News - Multi-Sources
channel.description: Actualités fusionnées de plusieurs entreprises IA leaders

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Leanstral: Open-Source foundation for trustworthy vibe-coding
item.description: First open-source code agent for Lean 4.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Mistral AI partners with NVIDIA to accelerate open frontier models
item.description: As a founding member of the NVIDIA Nemotron Coalition, Mistral AI is contributing large-scale model development and multimodal capabilities.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Introducing Mistral Small 4
item.description: Introducing Mistral Small 4

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Introducing Forge
item.description: Today, we’re introducing Forge, a system that allows enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Speaking of Voxtral
item.description: Voxtral TTS: A frontier, open-weights text-to-speech model that’s fast, instantly adaptable, and produces lifelike speech for voice agents.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Connect the dots: Build with built-in and custom MCPs in Studio
item.description: Connect enterprise data to your AI applications with reusable connectors, direct tool calling, and human-in-the-loop approval controls.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Workflows for work that runs the business
item.description: Workflows is now in public preview.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Remote agents in Vibe. Powered by Mistral Medium 3.5.
item.description: Introducing Mistral Medium 3.5, remote coding agents in Vibe, plus new Work mode in Le Chat for complex tasks.

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry
item.description: Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry

item.title: [Mistral AI - News & Updates] Remote agents in Vibe. Powered by Mistral Medium 3.5.
item.description: Introducing Mistral Medium 3.5, remote coding agents in Vibe, plus new Work mode in Le Chat for complex tasks.

item.title: [Anthropic News] UST is bringing Claude to physical AI
item.description: UST is bringing Claude to physical AI

item.title: [Anthropic News] Inviting hard questions
item.description: Inviting hard questions

item.title: [Anthropic News] Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust
item.description: Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust

item.title: [Anthropic News] Introducing a way to reflect on how you use Claude
item.description: Introducing a way to reflect on how you use Claude

item.title: [Anthropic News] Introducing Claude for Teachers
item.description: Introducing Claude for Teachers

item.title: [Anthropic News] Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research
item.description: Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research

item.title: [Anthropic News] Apply for Anthropic’s AI for Science rare disease research grants
item.description: Apply for Anthropic’s AI for Science rare disease research grants

item.title: [Anthropic News] Anthropic is donating another $20 million to Public First Action
item.description: Anthropic is donating another $20 million to Public First Action

item.title: [Anthropic News] A research agenda for the Economic Futures Research Fund
item.description: A research agenda for the Economic Futures Research Fund

item.title: [Anthropic News] Ask Claude about the Anthropic Economic Index
item.description: Ask Claude about the Anthropic Economic Index

item.title: [Anthropic News] Inviting hard questions
item.description: We’re asking the public for their hardest questions about AI, and committing to show our work as we address them.

item.title: [Anthropic News] Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available
item.description: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.

item.title: [Anthropic News] Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.

item.title: [Anthropic News] Redeploying Fable 5
item.description: Fable 5 returns globally July 1. We're also proposing an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity, together with Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and other Glasswing partners.
